_description: Appointment Reminders — timing rules, touchpoint stages, channel formatting

booking_confirmation.label: Booking Confirmation
booking_confirmation.purpose: Confirm date/time, set expectations, provide directions

day_before_reminder.label: Day-Before Reminder
day_before_reminder.purpose: Reduce no-shows, remind customer to arrange transport if needed

day_after_thank_you.label: Post-Visit Thank-You
day_after_thank_you.purpose: Express gratitude, confirm any follow-up needs

review_request.label: Review Request
review_request.purpose: Capture Google/Yelp review while experience is fresh

sms.avoid_hours: before 8:00 AM or after 8:00 PM local time

service_type_notes.brake_service: Advise customer to arrange a ride — vehicle may need to stay.
service_type_notes.diagnostic: Set expectation that diagnosis alone may take 1–2 hours before repair quote.
service_type_notes.transmission: Always suggest drop-off; job typically takes a full day.
service_type_notes.tire_rotation: Can be combined with oil change — mention if applicable.
service_type_notes.general_repair: Confirm if parts need to be ordered ahead of visit.

reminder_best_practices: Always include the shop phone number so customers can call to reschedule.
Never send more than 2 messages per appointment window.
Personalize with customer first name and vehicle year/make/model when available.
Include a one-tap link to reschedule or confirm when platform supports it.
